Bio:
Sheryl R. Rentz is the Owner and principal attorney at the Law Offices of Sheryl R. Rentz, a Montgomery County, Pennsylvania-based firm specializing in family law. With over 25 years of legal experience, she represents clients in divorce, child custody, child support, alimony, property division, high-asset cases, and mediation. Licensed to practice in both Pennsylvania and New Jersey, Attorney Rentz is recognized as one of the region's most skilled negotiators and litigators in family law matters, with particular expertise in complex financial issues and high-profile divorces.

Before transitioning to law, Sheryl Rentz worked as an engineer at AT&T Bell Laboratories for 16 years, attending law school in the evenings before earning her J.D. from Temple Law School in 1991. She is an active member of the Pennsylvania Bar Association, New Jersey Bar Association, and Philadelphia County Bar Association, and has served as Co-chair of the Montgomery Bar Association Joint Liaison with Accountants Committee. Known for her straightforward approach, thorough preparation, and empathy, Attorney Rentz is dedicated to helping clients achieve successful outcomes and make a fresh start during challenging family law transitions.

Bio:
Christine Benedum is the founder and owner of Benedum Law, a personal injury law firm located in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Admitted to the Pennsylvania bar in 2007, she has accumulated over ten years of experience in personal injury law. Her career has spanned all sides of the courtroom, beginning with a clerkship for a Pennsylvania Court of Common Pleas judge and continuing with work at several large civil defense firms in Philadelphia representing insurance companies. This diverse background has equipped her with unique insights into insurance defense strategies, enabling her to more effectively advocate for injured clients.

Ms. Benedum established Benedum Law to provide clients with the combination of large firm experience, technological sophistication, and personalized attention. She has successfully litigated cases resulting in settlements exceeding $20 million and is recognized as a top-rated personal injury attorney in Philadelphia by Super Lawyers. Known for her aggressive negotiation tactics with insurance companies, Christine is also valued by clients for her approachable demeanor, empathy, and authentic directness. Her expertise encompasses a wide range of personal injury matters, and she serves clients throughout the Philadelphia area, including Chestnut Hill, Mount Airy, Germantown, Wyndmoor, and Cheltenham.

Company Location: 5900 Corporate Drive, Pittsburgh, PA 15237, United States
Company Description: Tri-State Orthopaedics & Sports Medicine (TSO) has provided a full range of orthopaedic care to communities in the tri-state area and across the country. We have served the area's professional and amateur athletes for more than 40 years. We are team physicians for many local high schools, caring for athletes from a wide-range of sports in a variety of athletic programs. TSO is a multi-specialty orthopaedic practice of Board Certified physicians. All of our physicians provide general orthopaedic care and have also completed advanced fellowship training in specific areas of orthopaedic care, including hand, wrist and upper extremity surgery; foot and ankle surgery; arthroscopic shoulder, elbow and knee surgery; sports medicine; hip and knee joint replacement and revision surgery; and spine surgery. We also offer Ortho Urgent Care hours.  We have offices in the North Hills, Fox Chapel, Seven Fields and Robinson Township.  At each of our office locations, TSO also provides physical, occupational and hand therapy services at Tri-State Physical Therapy (TSPT) to ensure quality and comprehensive rehabilitation care for our patients. Under the direction of our physicians, our therapists utilize progressive techniques and state-of-the-art equipment to provide each of our patients with an individualized and complete rehabilitation program. Our therapy protocols, based on the particular needs and circumstances of each patient, are designed to help our patients return to the lifestyle and job duties they enjoyed prior to their injury or illness. This coordination and continuity of care with close and constant communication with our physicians and therapists, together with the active participation of our patients, helps to speed and enhance our patient's recovery process for a quick and safe return to work or play. In addition to conservative and post-surgical therapy, TSPT provides pre-operative therapy and patient education, such as free crutch training programs.

Title: President
Company Location: PA, United States
Company Description:
emUrgent Health is a business development company that prepares health systems and private practices to develop, operate, or partner with, urgent care and emerging health facilities. Our focus is on developing urgent care centers that will revolutionize the industry and prepare for population health management. In addition, we specialize in improving operational and financial performance, patient satisfaction and growth in both new and existing centers. We also provide solutions for revenue cycle management and developing new and "emerging" urgent care services that meets the specific needs of the service area.

The urgent care industry is rapidly changing and operators must focus not only  on how to be the portal of entry of their population, but  develop a facility that meets the needs of a diverse  and growing population. HHS has stated that they will sunset 50% of fee for service by 2019 and move toward payment models that encourage "volume to value". The urgent care centers that add value to population health management are the new standard and emerging centers of the future.

We help hospitals and operators develop a plan, for either new or existing centers, to re-focus their urgent care efforts on not just treating episodic care, but looking at the health status of their patients and getting them to the new services of the "emUrgent" health center. The benchmarks of "best in class" urgent care centers are changing. Integrating patients into a model promoting better overall health status and outcomes are the objectives and incentives of the Affordable Care Act.

Title: Surgical Neurophysiologist
Company Location: 700 Us Highway 46, Fairfield, NJ 07004, United States
Company Description:
We are a Joint Commission-accredited organization, exclusively providing Intraoperative Neuromonitoring (IONM). Patient safety being our top priority, we employ one of the most highly-trained and educated staffs in the industry. Title: plastic surgeon

Dr. Bucky is certified by the American Board of Plastic Surgery, and is a Fellow of the American College of Surgeons. He specializes in cosmetic enhancement procedures for the face, breast, and body. Regularly recognized by numerous national publications for his clinical expertise, Dr. Bucky is a leading mind in the field of aesthetic enhancement. Through the combination of classic plastic surgery training, continuing education, the latest techniques and extensive pre- and post-operative planning, he believes he can achieve a result that enhances the natural and unique beauty of each patient.

The decision to undergo a cosmetic enhancement procedure is a very personal experience. Dr. Louis P. Bucky customizes procedures to his patient’s individual needs. This personalized approach to care can ensure the successful combination of your goals with the latest techniques and procedures to provide the best possible aesthetic outcome. Building on a prestigious educational foundation, Dr. Bucky is a self-motivated and progressive plastic surgeon dedicated to the latest advancements in cosmetic technique and technology. Above all else, he focuses on creating natural-looking results to satisfy each patient’s expectations while maintaining the highest standards of safety and compassionate care. Dr. Bucky typically performs more than 1,000 plastic and reconstructive surgeries each year, and continues to be one of the most experienced and skilled plastic surgeons in the area.

Dr. Bucky strives to achieve a natural result in all aspects of plastic surgery. In addition, we believe that careful pre-operative planning and post-operative care can significantly improve your outcome. Therefore, ancillary services (vitamin supplementation, medically supervised skin care, soft tissue massage therapy, etc.) play an important role in your surgery program.

Title: Physician
Company Location: 2910 North 3rd Avenue, Phoenix, AZ 85013, United States
Company Description:
Providing world-class neurosurgery through innovative, compassionate and coordinated care to meet each of our individual patient's needs.
While we’re lifelong students in the world of brain and spine advancements, we also drive much of that discovery and achievement through our association with our hospital partners. We diagnose and treat a wide array of complex conditions and have proven, evidence-based outcomes. We’re exhaustive in our process to find the right solution for our patients, whether surgical or non-surgical.
We don’t share the following facts to be boastful, but rather to illustrate how we’ve shaped the world of neurosurgery. That’s the type of expertise you should demand as a patient.
We perform more than 10,000 procedures per year, giving us the confidence and expertise to handle complex cases that many other centers simply can’t treat.
We’ve pioneered numerous procedures and techniques, including the cardiac standstill surgery, neuro-spinal scaffolding implants, the development of a spinal surgery robot, and more.
Our surgeons developed new approaches to reach lesions in the difficult-to-reach skull-base area of the brain, enabling removal of what was previously considered inoperable.
Through our partnership with Barrow Neurological Institute, patients have access to hundreds of clinical trials, enabling more aggressive treatment options, sooner.
Mission: We’re honored to call Barrow our home. It enables us to find answers where all other paths lead to “no.” Here, we strive to make the impossible possible.

Title: Surgeon

Company Description:
Mercy Health -- Youngstown (MHY) is the premier integrated health system in the Mahoning Valley of Ohio.  MHY is a Catholic, nonprofit health system providing nationally ranked care across the continuum from physician offices and ambulatory care sites, to hospital-based acute care, to home care, to long-term care, and to palliative medicine and hospice.  MHY is a region of Mercy Health, headquartered in Cincinnati, the largest integrated health system in Ohio.
MHY includes three Magnet-certified acute hospitals: 
1. St. Elizabeth Youngstown Hospital -- a 388 bed teaching hospital and regional referral center. St. E's includes the only Level I Trauma Center for a nine county catchment area and provides broad clinical leadership in Heart & Vascular care, Neurosurgery and Neurosciences, Oncology, Trauma, Critical Care, Orthopedics and Spine Surgery, Internal Medicine, Breast Care Center, Robotic Surgery, and Minimally Invasive Surgery.  St. E's is a Joint Commission accredited Stroke Center and Spine Center of Excellence, and the first Magnet Hospital for Nursing leadership in the state of Ohio.  St. E's is the only Joint Commission-accredited Sepsis Center of Excellence in Ohio.
2.  St. Joseph Warren Hospital -- a 160-bed teaching hospital that provides Level II Trauma services to the Trumbull County and surrounding areas.  Areas of excellence include general surgery, bariatric surgery, ob/gyn, pediatrics, oncology and emergency medicine.
3.  St. Elizabeth Boardman Hospital -- an almost 240-bed community hospital, named in 2010 to Thomson-Reuters Top 100 Hospitals, with expertise in general surgery, orthopedics, obstetrics, internal medicine and emergency medicine.  SEB is the home to the market's only Level III OB and Level III NICU (operated by Akron Children's Hospital).

Title: Orthopeadic Surgeon
Company Location: 1777 Paterson-Hamburg Turnpike, Wayne, NJ 07470, United States
Company Description:
If an orthopedic injury, joint pain or deformity is stopping you from enjoying the quality of life you deserve, turn to a skilled team of orthopedic doctors. At Advanced Orthopaedic Associates in Wayne, NJ, you can look forward to compassionate care designed to restore your desired lifestyle. What separates this practice from other providers is a commitment to a unique two-phase care approach that features immediate treatment and recovery followed by prevention and long-term wellness solutions.
Led by a team of knowledgeable and talented orthopedic doctors, this local medical center offers services to those dealing with sports injuries, fractures, and joint conditions. For more than 25 years, patients have continued to put their faith in these board-certified experts and their commitment to personalized treatment plans. They will stop at nothing to help you reach your goals through innovative recovery options.
This proven team of physicians treats both surgical and non-surgical fractures of shoulders, elbows, and hips with physical therapy and controlled pain management regimens. You and your family will benefit from an accurate diagnosis that reveals muscle and tendon strains before they become serious issues. They also provide arthroscopy treatments for meniscal tears, cartilage injuries, and synovitis of the ankle.
Whether you’re bouncing back from a workplace accident or you’re looking to improve arthritis pain, the devoted team of orthopedic doctors at Advanced Orthopaedic Associates is determined to help you recover. Call them today at (973) 839-5700 to schedule an appointment or visit them online for more information.

Title: Physician
Company Location: 2 Worlds Fair Drive, Somerset, NJ 08873, United States
Company Description:
University Orthopaedic Associates is New Jersey’s leading orthopaedic practice. We are committed to the pursuit of excellence in orthopaedic treatment, medical education and training, clinical and bench research, and the promotion of community health. We provide the most current, technologically advanced, and personalized healthcare services available. 
Our streamlined patient experience encompasses the continuum of orthopaedic care, from diagnosis to treatment to rehabilitation, at each of our multiple locations. Fellowship-trained subspecialists in all aspects of orthopaedic care handle routine, complex and urgent cases. The surgical management of orthopaedic conditions includes upper extremity, foot and ankle, joint replacements, sports medicine, spine surgery, trauma, and fracture care. Physical and occupational therapy, plus sports performance programs, are offered at UOA’s Centers for Rehabilitation and Sports Excellence, while on-site MRIs, DEXA scans, and an orthopaedic surgery center are available in the Somerset office.
Our physicians are the orthopaedic health care providers for Rutgers University, Princeton University, the Somerset Patriots, US Ski and Snowboard Olympic teams and USRowing, as well as numerous high school teams.

Company Description:
A multidisciplinary spine center focused on nonsurgical solutions to back and neck pain

Coastal Spine is a multidisciplinary spine center focused on nonsurgical solutions to back and neck pain. We are a regional Center of Excellence, working with patients from around the region on simple to complex cases.  Our goal is to end chronic pain, and return our patients back to normal activity and health as soon as possible.

We Offer:
A non-surgical approach to resolving back and neck pain
On-site physical therapy
On-site nonsurgical procedures, including injections
On-site diagnostic testing, including x-rays and EMG’s.
In cases where surgery is necessary, our spine surgeons perform minimally invasive surgery at our nearby dedicated spine surgery center or local hospital.

What Makes Us Unique?
An Emphasis on a Nonsurgical Approach
We place emphasis on a nonsurgical approach to back and neck problems. While surgery may be appropriate in some cases, we explore all nonsurgical options first so that you can get back to being pain free as soon as possible.

Everything Under One Roof
We put everything under one roof. No more shuttling back and forth between doctor's offices. We are one of the only spine centers in New Jersey to combine spine-specialized orthopedic surgeons and spine neurosurgeons together with specialists in nonsurgical disciplines for treatment of back and neck pain.

Dedicated to Treating Spine Conditions
Nowhere else in the region will you find a team of physicians and staff who are dedicated solely to treating spine conditions that affect the neck and back. Learn more about our doctors.

We are a highly specialized practice. We see patients who have experienced back and neck pain for the first time and patients who have tried other types of treatment without relief. Whatever your condition, we will get you back to normal activity as smoothly and as soon as possible.

One of the nation’s preeminent plaintiffs’ law firms, Seeger Weiss is best known for multidistrict mass torts and class actions in both state and federal court. In 1876, the law firm today known as Capehart Scatchard was founded in Camden, New Jersey by Thomas French, a self-educated lawyer. We have earned and maintained our superb reputation for more than a century by providing our clients with quality legal services and by keeping a step ahead in areas of developing law. We anticipate our clients’ needs, keep apprised of legal developments and counsel preventative action to avoid trouble, now and later.
Our Firm’s commitment of providing clients with superior legal services in a prompt manner and at a reasonable cost is based on a three-tier approach: first, a sound technical knowledge of the law; second, a practical understanding of how to work efficiently with a “can do” attitude and not create obstacles; and third, the interpersonal skills needed to communicate well and frequently with clients.  That commitment is still firmly in place today.

Company Description:
Since 1933, Stark & Stark has developed innovative legal solutions to meet our clients’ needs. More than 100 attorneys, over 30 practice areas, and a philosophy of putting the law to work for our clients is the basis from which we build and maintain our practice.
Our Client Relationships
At Stark & Stark, we understand the importance of client relationships and recognize that those relationships have made us who we are today. Boasting one of the oldest law practices in New Jersey, Stark & Stark offers a full range of legal services for businesses and individuals. After more than 85 years, our attorneys continue to deliver practical, efficient solutions to clients in New Jersey, Pennsylvania, New York and throughout the United States. Our Work in the Community
Giving back to our communities is a tradition that Stark & Stark takes very seriously. Simply put, we believe it is the right thing to do. Whether individually or collectively, members of our firm (attorneys and staff) donate their time and resources for scores of community programs and philanthropic organizations. Many of our attorneys and staff are also active as board members and maintain leadership roles in the community.

Company Description:
Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) empowers people to take action to improve health outcomes.  Derived from the world's largest database of clinical lab results, our diagnostic insights reveal new avenues to identify and treat disease, inspire healthy behaviors and improve health care management.  Quest annually serves one in three adult Americans and half the physicians and hospitals in the United States, and our 47,000 employees understand that, in the right hands and with the right context, our diagnostic insights can inspire actions that transform lives.

The company reported 2020 revenues of $9.44 billion. 
Quest Diagnostics offers the most extensive clinical testing network in the U.S., with laboratories in most major metropolitan areas, & in Mexico, the UK & India. The company also operates four esoteric laboratories, 40 outpatient AP laboratories, & 160 smaller, rapid-response laboratories. 
Patients may have specimens collected in any of the company’s approximately 2,250 patient service centers. On a typical workday, testing is performed for about 550,000 patients. 
Quest Diagnostics empowers healthcare organizations & clinicians with state-of-the-art connectivity solutions. 
The company is the leading provider of pre-employment drugs-of-abuse screening for employers & risk assessment services for the life insurance industry. It is the world’s 2nd largest provider of clinical trials testing for new pharmaceuticals.

We’ve remained successful by making value a top priority. Through strategic purchasing and careful planning, we are able to offer the latest in branded clothing, shoes, accessories, baby products, and home furnishings at great savings.

Despite all that we have achieved, we are only just getting started. If you are looking to join a strong and growing organization that values innovative thinking, rewards hard work, and genuinely believes in teamwork, then look no further - join “Our Burlington” team and grow with us!

Title: General Counsel
Company Location: 1480 Grandview Avenue, Paulsboro, NJ 08066, United States
Company Description:
Aramsco supports the livelihoods of specialty contractors and service professionals across the U.S. and Canada. We equip each of our customers, who do important work for their communities—including restoration, remediation, environmental services, surface preparation, countertop fabrication, facility maintenance, and professional cleaning—with a wide range of mission-critical products and services, along with plenty of support, training, and know-how.
We provide our customers the equipment, chemicals and consumables they need to do their work. We sell a portfolio of over 60,000 products and stand ready to help source hard-to-find items. Our staff is highly trained on the environments in which our customers operate, and we provide technical support before, during, and after the sale. With over 70 locations across North America we can deliver the product where and when it is needed—our customers are on call 24/7 and so are we.
In addition to distributing products, we offer a variety of services to help our customers succeed including: training and education, equipment rentals, equipment repair and equipment financing. Our goal is to do whatever takes to help our customers!
Aramsco is part of a family of companies dedicated to helping specialty contractors, service professionals, and others with similar needs. We consider our customers to be part of our family. As such, we are an organization rooted in a culture of making our customers’ lives better. So we vow to do one thing a little better every day. To work as hard to keep their business as we do to earn it. To be active stewards of their goals and growth. To always hold ourselves accountable. And since their success is our success, to continue expanding on the products and services they rely on every day.

In 1957, founder Harold Honickman purchased a Pepsi-Cola manufacturing and distribution business in Pennsauken, New Jersey. The business had only a handful of employees and sold 300,000 cases in its first year. In the ensuing years, the company grew and Harold expanded into other beverage distribution businesses all the while remaining committed to the family-owned-and-operated model that has shaped The Honickman Companies® over more than half a century.
Today, our family has grown to include more than 2,500 team members who produce 60-plus brands, from water and soft drinks to sports drinks, teas, juices and energy drinks. Across our five companies and 17 facilities stretching from New York to the North Carolina border, we sell millions of cases annually, but we are proudest to have built a culture of respect, hard work and integrity.

Title: Immigration Attorney
Company Location: 1415 Route 70 East Suite 401, Cherry Hill, NJ 08034, United States
Company Description:
At the Law Office of Michele Contreras, we focus on turning the complex process of obtaining H-2B visas into a pathway for success, opening doors for temporary employment in the United States. Our firm is at the forefront of assisting employers and individuals in navigating the intricacies of immigration law, with a particular focus on H-2B visas for non-agricultural workers.
Our dedicated team of immigration attorneys brings extensive experience and a deep understanding of the H-2B visa process. We offer comprehensive services ranging from petition filing and labor certification to addressing cap limitations and navigating the seasonal nature of H-2B employment. Our goal is to ensure that employers can fill their temporary needs with qualified foreign workers and that individuals have the opportunity to live and work in the U.S. temporarily, contributing their skills to the American economy.
Why Partner With Us?
Tailored Solutions: We recognize the unique needs of each employer and employee, providing personalized strategies that align with your objectives and timelines.
Cap Navigation: Understanding the H-2B visa cap is crucial for timely applications. Our team stays abreast of the latest regulations and deadlines to maximize your chances of a successful petition.
Compliance and Advocacy: We ensure that all aspects of the H-2B visa process comply with U.S. immigration laws, advocating on your behalf for a smooth and efficient process.
For a consultation or to learn more about how we can assist with your H-2B visa needs, please contact us through LinkedIn or visit our website at https://mcontreraslaw.com/.
Law Office of Michele Contreras: Empowering your journey with expert H-2B visa services.

Since 1933, Stark & Stark has developed innovative legal solutions to meet our clients’ needs. More than 100 attorneys, over 30 practice areas, and a philosophy of putting the law to work for our clients is the basis from which we build and maintain our practice.
Our Client Relationships
At Stark & Stark, we understand the importance of client relationships and recognize that those relationships have made us who we are today. Boasting one of the oldest law practices in New Jersey, Stark & Stark offers a full range of legal services for businesses and individuals. After more than 85 years, our attorneys continue to deliver practical, efficient solutions to clients in New Jersey, Pennsylvania, New York and throughout the United States. Our attorneys are supported by a staff in excess of 200, all of whom are dedicated to providing the highest level of service to each client.
Our clients place considerable confidence in us and we take great pride in helping them achieve their goals. As we continue to explore new approaches to serving our clients and seek out new opportunities to expand our practice, our commitment remains steadfast: to provide effective legal solutions that not only emphasize the best interests of our clients, but also demonstrates the uncommon value of our service.
Our Work in the Community
Giving back to our communities is a tradition that Stark & Stark takes very seriously. Simply put, we believe it is the right thing to do. Whether individually or collectively, members of our firm (attorneys and staff) donate their time and resources for scores of community programs and philanthropic organizations. Many of our attorneys and staff are also active as board members and maintain leadership roles in the community.

Title: Senior Attorney
Company Location: 185 Valley Street, South Orange, NJ 07079, United States
Company Description:
Founded in 1976, the Community Health Law Project is a statewide nonprofit advocacy and legal services organization. Originally designed to deliver legal and advocacy services to the increasing number of people with mental illness leaving institutions and living in the community during the late 1970s, CHLP has expanded its innovative service model to include people from nearly all disability groups–those with developmental disabilities, visual impairments, physical disabilities, and people living with HIV/AIDS.
Today, the Community Health Law Project provides legal representation and advocacy services to low-income people with disabilities throughout the state. Its staff of over 60 people operates out of regional offices in Bloomfield, Elizabeth, Hamilton, Neptune, and Westmont, an administration office in South Orange, and satellite offices in Atlantic, Hudson, Ocean, Salem, and Burlington counties. The organization is unique in that it specializes in services exclusively for people with disabilities, although its areas of expertise cover the entire range of civil law. Through negotiation, litigation and advocacy, the Community Health Law Project removes discriminatory barriers, protects rights and preserves independence and quality of life.
In its 47 years, the Community Health Law Project has provided services to more than 75,000 individuals. Each year, CHLP helps nearly 5,000 NJ residents with disabilities through brief service and representation. The Community Health Law Project also educates thousands of practitioners of law, health and social work, as well as consumers and families, through conferences, special programs and its website, www.chlp.org.

Company Description:
NJ's Capital County
Open, accessible and responsible County government
County government brings our communities together, because it is regional and can improve the quality of life countywide, yet small enough to touch individual citizens.
Mercer County is a center for commerce and culture in the Garden State. Located midway between New York City and Philadelphia in New Jersey’s center, Mercer County’s 12 municipalities are home to more than 385,000 people in 226 square miles in the heart of region with 10% of the US population all within a 75-mile radius. 
The transportation infrastructure in Mercer County is also excellent. Key corridors along the New Jersey Turnpike in Mercer County are considered the most lucrative commerce centers in the state. In addition, Interstates 95, 195 and 295, as well as state highways routes 1, 29, 31 and 130 make Mercer County more attractive. Mercer County also offers access to commuter rail services, a light rail system and the Trenton-Mercer Airport.
With a highly skilled and educated labor pool we’re also home to Princeton University, Rider University, The College of New Jersey, Thomas Edison State University and Mercer County Community College. The county holds some of the states greatest cultural and historic sites with Revolutionary War battle sites in Trenton and Princeton.
Recreation and entertainment are abundant with first-class parks, five public golf courses, and the Trenton Thunder baseball team. CURE Insurance Arena is ranked among the best performing venues of its size in the world.
Mercer County’s excellent schools, tourist destinations, and diverse, well educated workforce make our county a great place to live, work and play.

Flaster Greenberg PC is a full-service, commercial business law firm serving clients across a range of industries in the public, private, government and nonprofit sectors. Our offices in New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania and Delaware are strategically located within the mid-Atlantic corridor in close geographic proximity to the hubs of business, industry and government. In 2018, the firm expanded its footprint into South Florida with the opening of the Boca Raton office.        
Our clients include companies in all stages of growth and development as well as individuals, from entrepreneurs and start-ups to established family businesses and large Fortune 500 corporations. Having evolved from a two-attorney tax boutique in the 1970s into a mid-sized commercial law firm, our reputation as a formidable alternative to mega national and international legal service providers has fueled our growth. 
Businesses including technology companies, manufacturers, commercial real estate developers, healthcare providers, and others as well as individuals increasingly seek our counsel. As the world around us continues to change, we proactively respond by broadening the depth of our practice areas and recommitting ourselves to our clients’ success. Flaster Greenberg attorneys value innovative thinking and practical solutions as cornerstones of the success that lies in achieving the best possible results for our clients.
Recognized as a top mid-size law firm by the National Law Journal, our attorneys are graduates from top-tier law schools including Harvard, Yale, Columbia, Georgetown and the University of Pennsylvania and have practiced at nationally-esteemed Am Law 100 and 200 firms. Many of our attorneys are nationally recognized for their work, and all of our attorneys focus on meeting the goals of their clients, working as a strategic partner and trusted business advisor.

Title: Attorney
Company Location: 2370 70, Cherry Hill, NJ 08002, United States
Company Description:
Reilly, McDevitt & Henrich, P.C. has earned its reputation for excellence in civil litigation on the local, regional and national levels. The breadth and sophistication of our practice is a source of pride for our firm and comfort to our clients. Our practice includes the defense of many types of claims including product liability, trucking and transportation, environmental, pharmaceutical, long term exposure, premises liability, employment issues, professional malpractice, construction defect matters, liquor liability matters, motor vehicle, insurance fraud and general liability. 
Complex multi-party litigation essentially gave birth to Reilly, McDevitt & Henrich, P.C. Our firm represents various companies sued in long term exposure cases involving asbestos, silica, welding rod, lead paint and solvents in the State and Federal Courts of New Jersey, Pennsylvania and Delaware. The firm represents several different clients in thousands of cases in the Pennsylvania, New Jersey and Delaware asbestos litigations. The firm serves as National Coordinating and Trial Counsel for three of those clients and Regional Trial Counsel for two others.
While the diversity of the practice has increased, our efforts remain firmly based in insurance defense. Our clients include insurers, corporations, municipalities and individuals in a broad variety of litigation matters. 
While we at Reilly, McDevitt & Henrich, P.C. take great pride in our history of courtroom success, it is the confidence shown in us by our clients from our firm's beginning that has given us the most satisfaction

In 1991, Tom Earp and Rich Cohn were practicing law at a large regional law firm. They found they were frustrated by many inefficiencies of the large firm setting—such as layers of internal bureaucracy, overstaffing of matters and resultant excessive fees, and assignment of matters to junior-level attorneys who did not understand the client’s business. They believed that these problems combined to create a wholly unsatisfactory attorney-client experience for many clients.
They had a vision—of a smaller, extremely talented firm, staffed by highly-skilled attorneys and staff, focused on providing top-notch legal counsel and representation, with a personalized, “client-first” approach. Sophisticated, responsive and cost-effective.
Earp Cohn P.C. was born of this vision.
For the vast majority of personal, transactional and litigation matters for which individuals and businesses require legal counsel, Tom and Rich believed that a smaller firm, comprised of the right professionals, could provide legal services at least as good as a firm with hundreds of attorneys, but with better service and with more reasonable fees. At Earp Cohn, we believe our clients deserve no less.
Since its formation in 1991, Earp Cohn has held firm to that original vision, carefully and selectively adding attorneys who share that vision of providing high-quality legal services to our clients. We also pride ourselves on being able to provide excellent legal counsel to our clients in an ever-increasing range of practice areas.
Over twenty-five years later, the Earp Cohn team remains committed to providing every client with an exceptional attorney-client experience.

Title: Trial Attorney
Company Location: 20 Brace Road, Cherry Hill, NJ 08034, United States
Company Description:
In 1991, Tom Earp and Rich Cohn were practicing law at a large regional law firm. They found they were frustrated by many inefficiencies of the large firm setting—such as layers of internal bureaucracy, overstaffing of matters and resultant excessive fees, and assignment of matters to junior-level attorneys who did not understand the client’s business. They believed that these problems combined to create a wholly unsatisfactory attorney-client experience for many clients.
They had a vision—of a smaller, extremely talented firm, staffed by highly-skilled attorneys and staff, focused on providing top-notch legal counsel and representation, with a personalized, “client-first” approach. Sophisticated, responsive and cost-effective.
Earp Cohn P.C. was born of this vision.
For the vast majority of personal, transactional and litigation matters for which individuals and businesses require legal counsel, Tom and Rich believed that a smaller firm, comprised of the right professionals, could provide legal services at least as good as a firm with hundreds of attorneys, but with better service and with more reasonable fees. At Earp Cohn, we believe our clients deserve no less.
Since its formation in 1991, Earp Cohn has held firm to that original vision, carefully and selectively adding attorneys who share that vision of providing high-quality legal services to our clients. We also pride ourselves on being able to provide excellent legal counsel to our clients in an ever-increasing range of practice areas.
Over twenty-five years later, the Earp Cohn team remains committed to providing every client with an exceptional attorney-client experience.

Company Description:
In 1991, Tom Earp and Rich Cohn were practicing law at a large regional law firm. They found they were frustrated by many inefficiencies of the large firm setting—such as layers of internal bureaucracy, overstaffing of matters and resultant excessive fees, and assignment of matters to junior-level attorneys who did not understand the client’s business. They believed that these problems combined to create a wholly unsatisfactory attorney-client experience for many clients.
They had a vision—of a smaller, extremely talented firm, staffed by highly-skilled attorneys and staff, focused on providing top-notch legal counsel and representation, with a personalized, “client-first” approach. Sophisticated, responsive and cost-effective.
Earp Cohn P.C. was born of this vision.
For the vast majority of personal, transactional and litigation matters for which individuals and businesses require legal counsel, Tom and Rich believed that a smaller firm, comprised of the right professionals, could provide legal services at least as good as a firm with hundreds of attorneys, but with better service and with more reasonable fees. At Earp Cohn, we believe our clients deserve no less.
Since its formation in 1991, Earp Cohn has held firm to that original vision, carefully and selectively adding attorneys who share that vision of providing high-quality legal services to our clients. We also pride ourselves on being able to provide excellent legal counsel to our clients in an ever-increasing range of practice areas.
Over twenty-five years later, the Earp Cohn team remains committed to providing every client with an exceptional attorney-client experience.

"Medical Malpractice is the only thing we do."

Pursuing a medical malpractice claim is often complicated, difficult, and expensive. We believe that in order to maintain the expertise needed to be consistently successful, we must focus 100% of our professional time on handling medical malpractice cases only. We have therefore chosen to completely limit our legal practice to representing people who have been severely injured or killed as a result of medical neglect.

In 1991, Tom Earp and Rich Cohn were practicing law at a large regional law firm. They found they were frustrated by many inefficiencies of the large firm setting—such as layers of internal bureaucracy, overstaffing of matters and resultant excessive fees, and assignment of matters to junior-level attorneys who did not understand the client’s business. They believed that these problems combined to create a wholly unsatisfactory attorney-client experience for many clients.
They had a vision—of a smaller, extremely talented firm, staffed by highly-skilled attorneys and staff, focused on providing top-notch legal counsel and representation, with a personalized, “client-first” approach. Sophisticated, responsive and cost-effective.
Earp Cohn P.C. was born of this vision.
For the vast majority of personal, transactional and litigation matters for which individuals and businesses require legal counsel, Tom and Rich believed that a smaller firm, comprised of the right professionals, could provide legal services at least as good as a firm with hundreds of attorneys, but with better service and with more reasonable fees. At Earp Cohn, we believe our clients deserve no less.
Since its formation in 1991, Earp Cohn has held firm to that original vision, carefully and selectively adding attorneys who share that vision of providing high-quality legal services to our clients. We also pride ourselves on being able to provide excellent legal counsel to our clients in an ever-increasing range of practice areas.
Over twenty-five years later, the Earp Cohn team remains committed to providing every client with an exceptional attorney-client experience.

As the oldest and largest lemon law and automotive consumer advocacy firm in the Northeast, we have provided cost-free legal help to over 80,000 distressed drivers over the past 26 years.  Since our inception, we have recovered more than $165 million for our clients and our efforts have been featured on Nightline, Good Morning America, the CBS Early Show, Extra and thousands of consumer news stories. We are also proud to have been honored for our efforts by Super Lawyers, Philly.Com, New Jersey Law Journal, Delaware Today and the American Bar Association.

Our website, www.lemonlaw.com, provides comprehensive information on State Lemon Laws and Federal Warranty Laws, as well as a variety of special features including the Car Complaint Index, The Lemon Checker and the Lemon "Blawg"​ featuring the most recent automotive headlines and defect trends.  If you think you are driving a lemon, call 1 800 LEMON LAW (1 800 536 6652).
Most recently, we have expanded our firm to go after deceitful debt collectors who endlessly harass consumers.  Through the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act and the Telephone Consumer Protection Act, we have been able to assist thousands of consumers nationwide in ceasing collection calls and collecting sizable compensation.  For more information on stopping debt collection harassment, visit www.creditlaw.com or call 1 800 NOT FAIR ( 1 800 668 3247).
